changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Pathology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Update Sample Creation page with enhanced metadata fields including patient identification, clinical and research metadata

column.name: instructions
column.value: Create the pathology sample and capture all required metadata. PATIENT IDENTIFICATION: First Name is MANDATORY (Surname/Last Name is optional), National ID is OPTIONAL. CLINICAL SAMPLES: Enter Patient ID, requesting clinician, collection date/time, specimen type/site (e.g., liver biopsy, lung FNA), clinical details/indication. RESEARCH SAMPLES: Enter Study ID, Principal Investigator (PI) name, Participant ID or Animal ID, sample type, collection date/time, ethical approval reference. ALL SAMPLES: Record receiving date/time and receiving staff name. System generates unique lab accession number and barcode, sets status to 'Created - Pending QC'.

column.name: content

update.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1

column.name: instructions
column.value: Create the pathology sample and capture all metadata at once. Enter: Sample Identity (unique accession number, barcode, category - Clinical diagnostic/Research), Sample Source (Alert Hospital/Research project, received date/time, received by), Specimen Type (Histopathology: FFPE block, fresh biopsy, surgical resection; Cytopathology: FNA, body fluids, urine, sputum, cervical smear; Hematology: EDTA blood; Research: human tissue, animal tissue, bacterial pellets, cell cultures), Clinical/Research Metadata (Patient ID, requesting clinician, collection date/time, specimen site, clinical details for clinical samples; Study ID, PI name, participant/animal ID, ethical approval reference for research samples). System generates unique ID and barcode, sets status to 'Created - Pending QC'.

update.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1
